name: Barbara J. Levin, Legal Nurse Consultant
description: Certified Legal Nurse Consultant (LNCC) providing expert consultation and education in legal cases, with experience in orthopaedic trauma at Massachusetts General Hospital.

name: Jane Shufro MS, Nurse Consultant
description: Clinically active nurse with over 35 years experience providing expertise on healthcare system and litigation process for legal cases.

name: Kurtz Legal Nurse Consulting, LLC
description: Provides support to attorneys, insurance companies, hospitals, and healthcare agencies with diligent and insightful legal nurse consulting.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: unique ability to go through voluminous records and prepare an excellent chronology
All of our attorneys who have used her in the past have raved about her work
invaluable insights on the validity of cases
I can recommend her without reservation

sentiment.summary: Highly respected legal nurse consultant praised by attorneys for exceptional thoroughness, expertise in case analysis, and invaluable professional insights.

name: Legal Nurse Solutions, LLC
description: Offers medical records review, interpretation, analysis for plaintiff and defense clients in any medical specialty; can locate testifying experts.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: BEST Nurse, tremendous expertise and knowledge around the legal cases!
Fast, reliable and excellent service! Would recommend for any case needs.
She was exceptional to work with and receptive to my feedback.
Her unique 20+ years of clinical experience shine as an expert witness.

sentiment.summary: Universally praised for exceptional expertise, professionalism, responsiveness, and 20+ years of clinical experience in legal nursing consulting.

name: Paige Legal Nurse Consulting
description: Owner with 27 years of hospital experience in various specialties, actively practicing nursing, offering legal nurse consulting services.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Our legal nurse consultants can provide expertise on nursing, the healthcare system, and its inner workings.

sentiment.summary: Limited testimonial data suggests positive client satisfaction, with strong emotional endorsement and emphasis on professional healthcare expertise.
